info.name:
Search for applications that match the conditions specified in the request.
Non-admin users will only match applications that they have rights on.

params.name: query
params.description: Find applications where the ID, name or description contains this substring.

params.name: id_contains
params.description: Find applications where the ID contains this substring.

params.name: name_contains
params.description: Find applications where the name contains this substring.

params.name: description_contains
params.description: Find applications where the description contains this substring.

params.name: attributes_contain[string]
params.description: This is a request variable of the map type. The query format is "map_name[key]=value", e.g. If the map name is Age, the key type is string, and the value type is integer, the query parameter is expressed as Age["bob"]=18

params.name: order
params.description:
Order the results by this field path (must be present in the field mask).
Default ordering is by ID. Prepend with a minus (-) to reverse the order.

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit the number of results per page.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. 0 is interpreted as 1.

params.name: deleted
params.description: Only return recently deleted applications.

items.docs:
Search for applications that match the conditions specified in the request.
Non-admin users will only match applications that they have rights on.

info.name:
Search for OAuth clients that match the conditions specified in the request.
Non-admin users will only match OAuth clients that they have rights on.

params.name: query
params.description: Find OAuth clients where the ID, name or description contains this substring.

params.name: id_contains
params.description: Find OAuth clients where the ID contains this substring.

params.name: name_contains
params.description: Find OAuth clients where the name contains this substring.

params.name: description_contains
params.description: Find OAuth clients where the description contains this substring.

params.name: attributes_contain[string]
params.description: This is a request variable of the map type. The query format is "map_name[key]=value", e.g. If the map name is Age, the key type is string, and the value type is integer, the query parameter is expressed as Age["bob"]=18

params.name: state
params.description:
Find OAuth clients where the state is any of these states.

 - STATE_REQUESTED: Denotes that the entity has been requested and is pending review by an admin.
 - STATE_APPROVED: Denotes that the entity has been reviewed and approved by an admin.
 - STATE_REJECTED: Denotes that the entity has been reviewed and rejected by an admin.
 - STATE_FLAGGED: Denotes that the entity has been flagged and is pending review by an admin.
 - STATE_SUSPENDED: Denotes that the entity has been reviewed and suspended by an admin.

params.name: order
params.description:
Order the results by this field path (must be present in the field mask).
Default ordering is by ID. Prepend with a minus (-) to reverse the order.

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit the number of results per page.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. 0 is interpreted as 1.

params.name: deleted
params.description: Only return recently deleted OAuth clients.

items.docs:
Search for OAuth clients that match the conditions specified in the request.
Non-admin users will only match OAuth clients that they have rights on.

info.name:

Non-admin users will only match gateways that they have rights on.

params.description: Find gateways where the ID contains this substring.

params.name: name_contains
params.description: Find gateways where the name contains this substring.

params.name: description_contains
params.description: Find gateways where the description contains this substring.

params.name: attributes_contain[string]
params.description: This is a request variable of the map type. The query format is "map_name[key]=value", e.g. If the map name is Age, the key type is string, and the value type is integer, the query parameter is expressed as Age["bob"]=18

params.name: eui_contains
params.description: Find gateways where the (hexadecimal) EUI contains this substring.

params.name: order
params.description:
Order the results by this field path (must be present in the field mask).
Default ordering is by ID. Prepend with a minus (-) to reverse the order.

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit the number of results per page.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. 0 is interpreted as 1.

params.name: deleted
params.description: Only return recently deleted gateways.

items.docs:
Search for gateways that match the conditions specified in the request.
Non-admin users will only match gateways that they have rights on.

info.name: ClientRegistry

List OAuth clients where the given user or organization is a direct collaborator.
If no user or organization is given, this returns the OAuth clients the caller
has access to.
Similar to Get, this selects the fields specified in the field mask.
More or less fields may be returned, depending on the rights of the caller.

info.name: Configuration

If unused, all supported Bands are returned.

If unused, all supported versions are returned.

info.name: Returns a list of supported LoRaWAN PHY Versions for the given Band ID.

info.name:
Create an API key scoped to this organization.
Organization API keys can give access to the organization itself, as well as
any application, gateway and OAuth client this organization is a collaborator of.

info.name:
Set the rights of a collaborator (member) on the organization.
Organization collaborators can get access to the organization itself, as well as
any application, gateway and OAuth client this organization is a collaborator of.
This method can also be used to delete the collaborator, by giving them no rights.
The caller is required to have all assigned or/and removed rights.

info.name: EndDeviceRegistrySearch
Search for end devices in the given application that match the conditions specified in the request.

params.name: query
params.description: Find end devices where the ID, name, description or EUI contains this substring.

params.name: id_contains
params.description: Find end devices where the ID contains this substring.

params.name: name_contains
params.description: Find end devices where the name contains this substring.

params.name: description_contains
params.description: Find end devices where the description contains this substring.

params.name: attributes_contain[string]
params.description: This is a request variable of the map type. The query format is "map_name[key]=value", e.g. If the map name is Age, the key type is string, and the value type is integer, the query parameter is expressed as Age["bob"]=18

params.name: dev_eui_contains
params.description: Find end devices where the (hexadecimal) DevEUI contains this substring.

params.name: join_eui_contains
params.description: Find end devices where the (hexadecimal) JoinEUI contains this substring.

params.name: dev_addr_contains
params.description: Find end devices where the (hexadecimal) DevAddr contains this substring.

params.name: order
params.description:
Order the results by this field path (must be present in the field mask).
Default ordering is by ID. Prepend with a minus (-) to reverse the order.

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit the number of results per page.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination. 0 is interpreted as 1.

items.docs: Search for end devices in the given application that match the conditions specified in the request.
